The supplied operator certificate is explicitly unratified, the canonical-Higgs identity is false, pole_residue_rows are empty, and all downstream evidence gates remain open.  This proves instrumentation reach only; it supplies no source-Higgs Gram purity, canonical-Higgs normalization, or retained y_t closure.
